source_text: The upper support member must be attached 50 mm or less from the top surface of the Front Bulkhead, and attach to the Front Hoop inside a zone extending 100 mm above and 50 mm below the Upper Side Impact member
requirement_text_pred: The upper support member must attach to the Front Hoop inside a zone extending 100 mm above and 50 mm below the Upper Side Impact member.
